mcqs.question: Which strategy is most suitable for solving the fractional knapsack problem?
mcqs.explanation: Fractional knapsack can be optimally solved using greedy approach by selecting items with highest value/weight ratio

mcqs.question: What is the main advantage of using dynamic programming for the 0/1 knapsack problem?

options.text: Reduces time complexity from O(2^n) to O(nW)

mcqs.explanation: DP improves exponential brute-force time to pseudo-polynomial O(nW) where W is capacity

mcqs.question: Which design paradigm is used in QuickSort algorithm?
mcqs.explanation: QuickSort divides array using pivot, sorts subarrays recursively

mcqs.question: What is the key difference between backtracking and branch-and-bound?

options.text: Backtracking uses DFS, branch-and-bound uses BFS

mcqs.explanation: Both differ in search strategy, use of bounds, and solution space exploration
